seo.title: Setu Queue — The QSR Operating System | Recipe, Kitchen & Food Cost Management
seo.description: Setu Queue is the operating system for modern QSRs — counter billing, kitchen display, recipe-driven inventory and real-time food cost tracking. Built for cafés, QSR chains, cloud kitchens and food courts.
seo.ogTitle: Setu Queue — The QSR Operating System
seo.ogDescription: Counter billing, kitchen display, recipe-driven inventory and real-time food cost — built for cafés, QSR chains, cloud kitchens and food courts.
seo.schemaDescription: The operating system for modern QSRs — counter billing, kitchen display, recipe-driven inventory and real-time food cost management for cafés, QSR chains, cloud kitchens and food courts.

hero.headline: The operating system for modern QSRs
hero.subheadline:
Run your counter, kitchen, recipes, inventory and customer pickup from one platform.
Know your food cost in real time.

workflow.headline: How it flows
workflow.note: Every order updates inventory automatically. Every sale feeds into food cost and profit.

differentiator.headline: Most POS systems know what you sold. Setu Queue knows what it cost.
differentiator.subtext: Other systems track products and prices. Setu Queue tracks ingredients, recipes and the actual cost of every item you sell — automatically, on every order.
differentiator.note: No other QSR POS in India does this properly at this price point.

features.heading: Recipe builder
features.body: Know exactly how much every item costs to make — including combos and customisations.

features.heading: Counter POS
features.body: Fast billing, thermal printing, offline support — keeps working even when internet goes down.

features.heading: Kitchen display
features.body: Orders appear at the kitchen screen the moment billing confirms — with preparation timers and ready status.

features.heading: Customer tracking
features.body: Customers scan a QR code to track their order live. Ready screen updates automatically — no app needed.

features.heading: Smart inventory
features.body: Ingredients deduct from stock automatically on every order. Low stock alerts and auto purchase orders included.

features.heading: AI menu creation
features.body: Create a new menu item — with recipe, ingredients and pricing — in under a minute.

features.heading: Multi outlet
features.body: One dashboard, every location. Sales, kitchen performance and food cost visible across all outlets in real time.

features.heading: Profit reports
features.body: See profit per menu item, food cost percentage, hourly sales and kitchen performance — not just total revenue.

steps.title: Customer orders
steps.body: Staff takes the order at the counter and confirms billing. Token number generated instantly.

steps.title: Kitchen notified + inventory updated
steps.body: Order routes digitally to the kitchen the moment billing confirms. Ingredients are automatically deducted from inventory based on the recipe.

steps.title: Pickup display updates
steps.body: When the kitchen marks the order ready, the customer's token number moves to the "Ready" column on the display screen.

comparison.headline: Not sure which Setu product is right for you?

columns.name: Setu Queue
columns.customerExperience: Order at counter, wait for pickup

comparison.footnote: If your customers sit down and a staff member serves them — Setu Dine is built for you. If your customers order at the counter and collect their food — Setu Queue is built for you.

items.question: What is Setu Queue?
items.answer: Setu Queue is a QSR operating system — not just a billing app. It connects your counter, kitchen, recipes, inventory and customer pickup in one platform. The biggest difference from other POS systems is that every order automatically updates inventory and calculates your food cost in real time.

items.question: How does the recipe-driven inventory work?
items.answer: When you build a product in Setu Queue, you define its recipe — which ingredients go into it and in what quantities. Every time that product is sold, those ingredients are automatically deducted from your inventory. You always know your stock levels and the actual cost of every item you've sold.

items.question: What is the kitchen display system?
items.answer: The kitchen display shows every order in real time the moment billing is confirmed — with preparation timers, order sequence and ready status. When kitchen staff mark an order complete, the customer's token number moves to the Ready Screen automatically.

items.question: How does customer order tracking work?
items.answer: Every order generates a token number. Customers can scan a QR code to track their order status live on their phone, or watch the Ready Screen display. No app download or login required.

items.question: Does Setu Queue work offline?
items.answer: Yes. Counter billing and receipt printing work without internet. Orders created offline sync automatically when connectivity is restored. Kitchen display status requires a live connection to stay accurate — this is by design.

items.question: Is Setu Queue GST compliant?
items.answer: Yes. Setu Queue has a built-in tax engine that applies GST automatically on every order based on order type — no manual rate selection required at the counter.

items.question: What is the difference between Setu Queue and Setu Dine?
items.answer: They are separate products for different restaurant models. Setu Queue is for counter-service restaurants (QSRs, cafés, food courts, cloud kitchens) where customers order at the counter and wait for pickup. Setu Dine is for table-service restaurants where customers are seated and served by staff. You choose the one that matches your service model.

items.question: Is there a demo available?
items.answer: Yes. Book a free 30-minute demo and we'll walk through counter billing, recipe costing, kitchen display and the pickup screen for your specific setup.
